{"id": "part:ford:6006", "brand": "ford", "sourceids": ["source:ford-parts-kb"], "basic": "6006", "description": "service engine", "category": "engine", "aliases": "complete engine, warranty engine", "part_numbers": "", "applications": "", "supersessions": "", "notes": "a basic long block. it features the engine block, pistons, connecting rods, crankshaft, camshaft, and cylinder heads. other accessories may come seperately:
intake and exhaust manifolds: these usually must be transferred from the old engine.
engine electrical & sensors: wiring harnesses, fuel injectors, ignition coils, and alternators are normally excluded.turbocharger: if your vehicle is turbocharged, it does not come with the turbo unless specifically ordered as a long-block variant that includes it.
fuel system components: high-pressure fuel pumps and related lines are generally omitted.
front end accessories: water pumps, power steering pumps, a/c compressors, and drive belts.", "source": "manual entry", "updated": "2026-06-10 04:21:47"}
